steps.dialogue: [event:690cdc22adf50042] Today you[event:690cdc3c45a017a8]  learned how to partition bars into equal parts. You learned that for fractions to work, all the [event:690cdd0e0ba6c79a]  parts must be exactly the same size. And you found patterns in how [event:690cddd5fcbe5383]the number of parts affects their size[event:690cded78747128a].
You didn't just follow steps - you understood WHY equal parts matter.
Great work today! Next time, we'll use everything you learned about equal parts to start [event:690ced1249981cac] naming specific fractions. You're ready for that next step!
